classDiagram class lmr_analyzer { } class AmzSerializer { } class analysis { } class DistanceMatrix { } class geometry { } class package { } class route { } class stop { } class utils { } class vehicle { } lmr_analyzer --> AmzSerializer lmr_analyzer --> analysis lmr_analyzer --> DistanceMatrix lmr_analyzer --> geometry lmr_analyzer --> package lmr_analyzer --> route lmr_analyzer --> stop lmr_analyzer --> utils lmr_analyzer --> vehicle AmzSerializer --> package AmzSerializer --> route AmzSerializer --> stop AmzSerializer --> vehicle route --> stop route --> utils stop --> package
